tools.name: forex_rates
tools.description: Get MUR exchange rates from Bank of Mauritius. Costs $0.001 USDC via x402.

tools.name: fuel_prices
tools.description: Get petroleum retail prices from STC Mauritius. Costs $0.001 USDC via x402.

tools.name: stock_market
tools.description: Get SEMDEX and SEM indices from Stock Exchange of Mauritius. Costs $0.001 USDC via x402.

tools.name: weather
tools.description: Get current weather from all Mauritius Met Service stations. Costs $0.001 USDC via x402.

tools.name: macro_indicators
tools.description: Get Mauritius macro-economic indicators (GDP, CPI, unemployment, tourism). Costs $0.002 USDC via x402.

tools.name: monetary_policy
tools.description: Get Bank of Mauritius Key Repo Rate and Prime Lending Rates. Costs $0.002 USDC via x402.

tools.name: country_snapshot
tools.description: Get complete Mauritius economic pulse — ALL feeds in one call. Costs $0.005 USDC via x402.

tools.name: compliance_watchlist
tools.description: Screen any entity against comprehensive global watchlist records (OFAC, UN, EU, PEP, Interpol, crypto). Costs $0.005 USDC via x402.

tools.name: compliance_mauritius
tools.description: Search Mauritius FSC registry + ICIJ offshore leak connections. Costs $0.005 USDC via x402.

tools.name: compliance_jurisdiction_risk
tools.description: Get composite risk score for any of 179 countries — FATF grey/blacklist, CPI, Basel AML Index. Costs $0.001 USDC via x402.

tools.name: compliance_wallet
tools.description: Screen a blockchain wallet address against sanctioned/blacklisted crypto addresses (OFAC SDN, USDT Blacklist, USDC Blacklist, Ransomwhere, OpenSanctions, UK OFSI). Costs $0.003 USDC via x402.

tools.name: compliance_wallet_entity
tools.description: Compound Web2+Web3 screen: wallet address + entity name in one call with convergence detection. Bridges blockchain wallets to traditional sanctions databases. Costs $0.003 USDC via x402.

tools.name: govdata_search
tools.description: Search 812+ Mauritius government datasets. Costs $0.001 USDC via x402.

tools.name: due_diligence
tools.description: Compound entity screening package: watchlist screening + jurisdiction risk for detected nationalities + Mauritius FSC check + forex context + composite risk score. Replaces 5 separate API calls. Costs $0.010 USDC via x402.

tools.name: transaction_screen
tools.description: Cross-border transaction pre-screening: checks sender + receiver against watchlists, evaluates jurisdiction risk, provides forex corridor rate, returns PROCEED/REVIEW/FLAG/BLOCK recommendation. Replaces 6 API calls. Costs $0.008 USDC via x402.

tools.name: country_brief
tools.description: Complete country intelligence brief: compliance risk assessment + live economic data. For Mauritius (MU) includes all 7 oracle feeds (forex, macro, monetary, stock market, weather, fuel). Replaces 8 API calls. Costs $0.010 USDC via x402.

tools.name: network_scan
tools.description: Entity relationship intelligence: finds all watchlist hits, traverses entity relation graph, screens connected entities, produces risk network map with composite scoring per node. Replaces 10-20 API calls + manual graph analysis. Costs $0.015 USDC via x402.

tools.name: travel_rule_screen
tools.description: FATF R16 Travel Rule compliance: screens both originator and beneficiary wallets, entity names, and jurisdictions in one call. Returns structured compliance packet with unique packetId that counter-parties can verify. Costs $0.005 USDC via x402.

tools.name: monitor_subscribe
tools.description: Subscribe a wallet or entity for 30-day continuous monitoring. If the target appears on any sanctions, PEP, or crypto blacklist, the status flips to 'alerted'. Optional webhook for push notifications. Costs $0.010 USDC via x402.

tools.name: monitor_check
tools.description: Check monitoring subscription status. Re-screens the subscribed wallet/entity against the latest database and returns current alert state. Costs $0.003 USDC via x402.

tools.name: facilitator_kya
tools.description: Know Your Agent — ERC-8004 registry lookup + sanctions screening + signed JWT attestation for any wallet address. Returns agent registration status, operator wallet, screening results, and coldStartSignals. FREE.

tools.name: facilitator_supported
tools.description: Get SENTINEL facilitator capabilities — supported payment schemes, networks, assets, and compliance features. FREE.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: country_snapshot · Private data: compliance_watchlist, compliance_wallet, compliance_wallet_entity, monitor_subscribe, monitor_check, facilitator_kya · Public sink: monitor_subscribe.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: country_snapshot · Private data: compliance_watchlist, compliance_wallet, compliance_wallet_entity, monitor_subscribe, monitor_check, facilitator_kya · Public sink: monitor_subscribe

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
